summary: Documentation build failed due to an unresolved git merge conflict in transformers/modeling_utils.py. The merge conflict marker '<<<<<<< sonic-moe' at line 1974 causes a Python SyntaxError when the file is imported during documentation autodoc processing.
root_cause: Unresolved git merge conflict marker (<<<<<<< sonic-moe) at line 1974 in transformers/modeling_utils.py causes SyntaxError when Python parser encounters the invalid syntax during module import.

evidence.reason: Direct evidence of unresolved git merge conflict marker appearing in Python source code at the exact line causing the syntax error
Python parser reports syntax error when encountering the merge conflict marker, which is not valid Python
Code path shows the error occurs during module import/attribute access when doc-builder tries to resolve autodoc references

suggested_fix: Resolve the git merge conflict in transformers/modeling_utils.py at line 1974 by removing the conflict markers (<<<<<<< sonic-moe, =======, and >>>>>>>) and choosing the intended code between them.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
